# poe327.net

poe327.net is an independent Path of Exile 3.27 launch runbook for Keepers of the Flame. It summarizes official-source context into player actions: patch notes, starter planning, challenge routing, loot filter setup, trade workflow, and hotfix checks.

Canonical site: https://poe327.net/
Primary topic: PoE 3.27 / Path of Exile 3.27 / Keepers of the Flame
Official-source bridge: https://poe327.net/patch-notes#official-sources
Starter planning: https://poe327.net/starters
Challenge route: https://poe327.net/challenge
Loot filter setup: https://poe327.net/filters
Trade workflow: https://poe327.net/trade/official

Important disclosure: poe327.net is unofficial and not affiliated with Grinding Gear Games. Use official Path of Exile pages for canonical wording and mechanics.
